Event: Spring Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI147
Dryad's Talisman Ring

Once in a while, the unit fires a magic orb at a random enemy. The orb bounces 3 times. Whenever the orb hits an enemy, one of the following effects is triggered:
- The orb has a 50% chance to deal 275000 physical damage to the target and disarm them for 3 sec. During this time, the disarmed enemy cannot use weapon abilities.
- The orb has a 50% chance to 275000 magic damage to the target and remove its armor for 3 sec. During this time, the enemy loses 45% armor stats and cannot use armor abilities for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
